description: Capitale millénaire au charme colonial. Mosquée Al-Noor et quelques restaurants halal dans le vieux quartier.

description_en: Hanoï may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 14 halal restaurants and 3 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Hanoï, Vietnam, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Hanoï: 14+ halal restaurants, 3 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.1/5.
